case_title: ROBERT BUTLER VS. JUSTIN MARTINELLI et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUTLER, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINELLI, JUSTIN MILLER, DAVID SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ADVANCING HEARING DATE RE DEMURRER, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUTLER, ROBERT

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT DAVID MILLER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE HABITUAL LATE PAYMENT IS NOT BREACH OF A COVENANT. A 3-DAY NOTICE IS NOT AVAILABLE AND PLAINTIFF MUST SERVE A 30 OR 60-DAY NOTICE CONSISTENT WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1946 OR SECTION 1946.1. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J.
